channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: SAPS dismisses fabricated video claims, details real incident involving security guard
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) in Mpumalanga has confirmed that a viral video falsely alleging an attack on a Namibian truck driver during recent national protests is entirely fabricated. Pol...

item.title: UDSM Student's Computational Research Offers New Hope for Schizophrenia Treatment
item.description: A third-year student at Tanzania’s University of Dar es Salaam, Anthony Tepeli, has pioneered a computer-based research project to identify potential new compounds for treating schizophrenia. His 10-m...

item.title: Alex Eala Makes History with Wimbledon R16 Win at Centre Court
item.description: Philippine tennis sensation Alex Eala etched her name in history by securing a historic victory at Wimbledon's Centre Court in the Round of 16. The win marks a monumental achievement for Filipino spor...

item.title: Two Women and Four Cats: A Memoir of Friendship and Shared Life
item.description: The article reviews the memoir 'Two Women Living Together' by Hwang Sunwoo and Kim Hana, which chronicles their journey of cohabitation as two single women in South Korea. The book explores themes of ...

item.title: TLGU Launches Women's Golf Vision and Lady President Cup
item.description: The Tanzania Ladies Golf Union (TLGU) has launched its 2026/2030 Presidential vision and strategic plan, focusing on transforming women's golf in Tanzania through youth development, education, leaders...

item.title: Modise calls for Hugo Broos' exit as Bafana seeks fresh football strategies
item.description: Former Bafana Bafana midfielder Teko Modise has urged the resignation of coach Hugo Broos, arguing that the national team requires new ideas to compete effectively. Despite Broos' success in elevating...

item.title: Linda Mwananchi Supporter Dies After Brutal Attack in Keumbu
item.description: Vincent Osiemo, a prominent Linda Mwananchi supporter, died following a violent attack by unidentified assailants in Keumbu, Kisii County. The incident occurred during a rally convoy traveling to Kero...

item.title: Iranian schoolchildren victims' families attend supreme leader's funeral amid war tensions
item.description: The article reports on the somber gathering of families whose children were killed in a bombing of an Iranian school during the U.S.-Israeli conflict, as they attend the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khame...

item.title: Indigenous Conservation Efforts Face Funding Gaps Amid Global Biodiversity Goals
item.description: The article highlights the challenges faced by Indigenous Protected Areas (IPAs) in Australia, which are underfunded compared to non-Indigenous managed areas like national parks. Despite being part of...

item.title: UK's Handling of Rape Gangs Under Scrutiny Amid Comparisons to Israel's October 7 Response
item.description: Barbara Kay's article critiques the UK's inadequate response to rape gangs, contrasting it with Israel's decisive action during October 7. The piece highlights a 219-page report by MP Rupert Lowe deta...

item.title: Regina Performer Gaining Recognition Across North America
item.description: The article highlights a performer originating from Regina, Saskatchewan, who is gaining significant attention across North America. While the text appears to be a compilation of various news headline...

item.title: New Gen Divas Showcase Powerful Vocals in Zsa Zsa Production
item.description: The article highlights the collaborative efforts of New Gen Divas Esang, Carmelle, and Elha, who delivered standout vocal performances in the production 'Zsa Zsa' under ASAP XP. Their powerful vocals ...

item.title: US Congressmember Discusses Monitoring Nigeria's 2027 Elections
item.description: A member of the United States House of Representatives, Riley Moore, has stated that the Trump administration will closely monitor Nigeria's 2027 general elections. Moore, representing West Virginia, ...

item.title: Terence Crawford Analyzes Defensive Skills of Floyd Mayweather and Pernell Whitaker
item.description: Terence Crawford has reflected on the defensive attributes of boxing legends Floyd Mayweather and Pernell 'Sweet Pea' Whitaker, ranking Mayweather as the superior defender. Mayweather's career include...

item.title: Punjab Police Investigate Kidnapping and Assault of Foreign Women, CM Orders Merit-Based Handling
item.description: The article details the investigation into the alleged kidnapping and sexual assault of two foreign women in Lahore, Pakistan. Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz directed authorities to handle the cas...

item.title: England's World Cup clash with Mexico faces fan disturbances and security challenges
item.description: The article details the chaotic scenes surrounding England's World Cup last-16 match against Mexico, focusing on the late-night disturbances caused by Mexican fans attempting to disrupt the team's pre...

item.title: Trump's Video Montage Sparks Laughter and Controversy at MS NOW
item.description: The article details a segment from MS NOW's 'The Weekend' program where a video montage of former President Donald Trump praising his administration's 'fair' justice system led to an unexpected reacti...

item.title: Reforming Canada's Equalization Program: A Path to Fairness and Efficiency
item.description: The article critiques Canada's federal equalization program, which aims to provide comparable services across provinces but has become outdated and inefficient. It highlights how the program, designed...

item.title: Iran's Persecution of the Baha’i Faith: A Human Rights Crisis
item.description: The article details the systematic persecution of Iran's Baha’i community under the Khomeinist regime, highlighting their marginalization as a 'dirty' religion. Baha’is face severe restrictions, inclu...

item.title: UIF Condemns Busa's Withdrawal from UIF Board, Calls for Continued Engagement
